results.description: DESCRIPTION:THE GOAL OF THIS PROJECT IS TO UNDERSTAND AND MITIGATE THE CURRENT AND POSSIBLE FUTURE SOIL HEAVY METAL AND METALLOID AND OTHER CHEMICAL CONTAMINANT EXPOSURE AMONG CHILDREN IN WEST ATLANTA BY ESTIMATING CHILDREN'S SOIL INGESTION RATES. USING TARGETED AND NON-TARGETED SOIL ANALYSES, RESEARCHERS WILL CREATE A DETAILED MAP SHOWING THE SOIL ABUNDANCES OF LEAD AND OTHER CHEMICAL CONTAMINANTS IN WEST ATLANTA, WHERE HIGH CONTAMINATION WAS RECENTLY FOUND. CHILDREN'S EXPOSURE TO LEAD AND OTHER CHEMICALS WILL ALSO BE QUANTIFIED USING SURVEY DATA AND BIOLOGICAL SAMPLES.ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.

DESCRIPTION:
THE GOAL OF THIS PROJECT IS TO UNDERSTAND AND MITIGATE THE CURRENT AND POSSIBLE FUTURE SOIL HEAVY METAL AND METALLOID AND OTHER CHEMICAL CONTAMINANT EXPOSURE AMONG CHILDREN IN WEST ATLANTA BY ESTIMATING CHILDREN'S SOIL INGESTION RATES. USING TARGETED AND NON-TARGETED SOIL ANALYSES, RESEARCHERS WILL CREATE A DETAILED MAP SHOWING THE SOIL ABUNDANCES OF LEAD AND OTHER CHEMICAL CONTAMINANTS IN WEST ATLANTA, WHERE HIGH CONTAMINATION WAS RECENTLY FOUND. CHILDREN'S EXPOSURE TO LEAD AND OTHER CHEMICALS WILL ALSO BE QUANTIFIED USING SURVEY DATA AND BIOLOGICAL SAMPLES.

THE GOAL OF THIS PROJECT IS TO UNDERSTAND AND MITIGATE THE CURRENT AND POSSIBLE FUTURE SOIL HEAVY METAL AND METALLOID AND OTHER CHEMICAL CONTAMINANT EXPOSURE AMONG CHILDREN IN WEST ATLANTA BY ESTIMATING CHILDRENS SOIL INGESTION RATES. USING TARGETED AND NON-TARGETED SOIL ANALYSES, RESEARCHERS WILL CREATE A DETAILED MAP SHOWING THE SOIL ABUNDANCES OF LEAD AND OTHER CHEMICAL CONTAMINANTS IN WEST ATLANTA, WHERE HIGH CONTAMINATION WAS RECENTLY FOUND.
